# debugDescription

**Instance Property**

A textual description of the location suitable for debugging.

## Declaration

```swift
var debugDescription: String { get }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to access debugging information about this object and the underlying [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreLocation/CLLocation] this object wraps.

## Determining the location

- **location**: Returns the object that contains the latitude, longitude, and course information this proxy simulates for the device.
